criteria_verification.criterion_text: Source Documents: mode restricted to `standard` or `vlm` (reject `ocr`)
criteria_verification.evidence: Mode restriction is enforced by the Pydantic model SourceDocument(mode: Literal['standard', 'vlm']). The validator adds a second line of defence via _validate_source_documents checking at least 1 entry exists. Tests verify model-level rejection of 'ocr' mode exists in test_models.py. Empty source_documents tested via test_empty_source_docs_fails.
criteria_verification.notes: Mode restriction is enforced by the Pydantic model SourceDocument(mode: Literal['standard', 'vlm']). criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _validate_layer_routing checking {'behaviour', 'knowledge'} - set(parsed.layer_routing.keys()). Tests: test_both_layers_present_passes, test_missing_knowledge_fails, test_missing_behaviour_fails, test_both_missing_fails.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _validate_layer_routing checking {'behaviour', 'knowledge'} - set(parsed.layer_routing.keys()). Tests: test_both_layers_present_passes, test_missing_knowledge_fails, test_missing_behaviour_fails, test_both_missing_fails.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Reasoning split: >= 70% of generation targets must be `reasoning` type (boundary: 70% passes, 69% fails)
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _validate_reasoning_split computing reasoning_count/total_count * 100 >= 70. Uses counts as authoritative (not percentages). Tests: test_exactly_70_percent_reasoning_passes (70/100), test_69_percent_reasoning_fails (69/100), test_60_percent_reasoning_fails (60/100), test_100_percent_reasoning_passes, test_various_counts_at_or_above_70_percent_pass (700/1000, 7/10, 71/100).
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _validate_reasoning_split computing reasoning_count/total_count * 100 >= 70. Uses counts as authoritative (not percentages). criteria_verification.criterion_text: Percentages in Generation Targets are advisory; counts are authoritative
criteria_verification.evidence: The _validate_reasoning_split function computes the split from counts (sum(t.count for t in targets)), not from any percentage field. Tests: test_various_counts_at_or_above_70_percent_pass verifies counts 700/300, 7/3, 71/29 all pass regardless of any percentage values.
criteria_verification.notes: The _validate_reasoning_split function computes the split from counts (sum(t.count for t in targets)), not from any percentage field. Tests: test_various_counts_at_or_above_70_percent_pass verifies counts 700/300, 7/3, 71/29 all pass regardless of any percentage values.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Multiple validation failures reported together in a single error
criteria_verification.evidence: validate_goal_config collects all errors in a list[tuple[str, str]], then raises a single GoalValidationError with all failures attached as err.failures. Tests: test_multiple_failures_aggregated (Goal + System Prompt + Evaluation Criteria all in one error), test_all_structural_failures_aggregated (all 9 sections failing simultaneously).
criteria_verification.notes: validate_goal_config collects all errors in a list[tuple[str, str]], then raises a single GoalValidationError with all failures attached as err.failures. Tests: test_multiple_failures_aggregated (Goal + System Prompt + Evaluation Criteria all in one error), test_all_structural_failures_aggregated (all 9 sections failing simultaneously).
